title: TV Star Mel Schilling Passes Away After Illness
summary: Mel Schilling, a famous coach on the TV show 'Married at First Sight,' has died at age 54. Her husband shared the sad news on Instagram. Mel was diagnosed with colon cancer in December 2023, and recently, the cancer spread to her brain. She passed away peacefully, surrounded by love from her family. Mel was known for helping people find love on the show since 2016. Her husband said she was a brave and kind person who never complained, even during tough times. He encouraged everyone to live life fully and love others well in her memory. Channel 4, the TV network, also expressed sadness and praised Mel for her joy and positivity.

background_read: Mel Schilling was a TV personality known for helping people find love on 'Married at First Sight,' a show where strangers get married and learn to build relationships. She started on the Australian version in 2016 and later joined the UK show. In December 2023, she was diagnosed with colon cancer, a type of illness that affects the large intestine. Despite her sickness, she continued to work and show kindness. Her story teaches us about bravery and the importance of cherishing life.
Article_Structure: WHO: Mel Schilling, a dating coach on 'Married at First Sight' TV show
WHAT: She died at age 54 after battling colon cancer that spread to her brain
WHERE: Her husband announced it on Instagram; she was from Australia and worked on UK TV
WHY: To share her passing and honor her life as a brave and loving person

perspectives.description: Mel was a cherished mother and wife who showed courage and love until the end.
